spatie/laravel-permission.notes: Requires v5.5+ for Laravel 9 support. Run: composer require spatie/laravel-permission:^5.5

livewire/livewire.notes: Livewire v2.10+ supports Laravel 9. No code changes required.

laravel/sanctum.notes: Sanctum v3 required for Laravel 9. The sanctum.php config file gained new keys. Publish config after upgrade: php artisan vendor:publish --tag=sanctum-config. Run: composer require laravel/sanctum:^3.0

laravel/passport.notes: Passport v11 required for Laravel 9. Passport v11 drops support for implicit grants by default. Run: composer require laravel/passport:^11.0

laravel/horizon.notes: Horizon v5.9+ supports Laravel 9. No breaking changes for most applications.

laravel/telescope.notes: Telescope v4.7+ supports Laravel 9. Re-publish assets after upgrade: php artisan telescope:publish

laravel/cashier-stripe.notes: Cashier v14 required for Laravel 9 compatibility. Includes Stripe API v2022+ support. Run: composer require laravel/cashier:^14.0

barryvdh/laravel-debugbar.notes: Debugbar v3.6+ supports Laravel 9. Run: composer require barryvdh/laravel-debugbar:^3.6

spatie/laravel-medialibrary.notes: MediaLibrary v10 required for Laravel 9. The filesystem changes in v9 require reviewing disk configuration. Run: composer require spatie/laravel-medialibrary:^10.0

spatie/laravel-activitylog.notes: laravel-activitylog v4.5+ required for Laravel 9. Run: composer require spatie/laravel-activitylog:^4.5

spatie/laravel-backup.notes: laravel-backup v8.1+ supports Laravel 9 and Flysystem v3. Run: composer require spatie/laravel-backup:^8.1

tymon/jwt-auth.notes: jwt-auth v2.0+ supports Laravel 9. Ensure JWT secret is regenerated after upgrade.

laravel/socialite.notes: Socialite v5.2+ supports Laravel 9. No major breaking changes for most providers.

maatwebsite/excel.notes: Laravel Excel v3.1.30+ supports Laravel 9. Run: composer require maatwebsite/excel:^3.1.30

fruitcake/laravel-cors.notes: fruitcake/laravel-cors is deprecated. Laravel 9 ships with CORS support built-in via config/cors.php. Remove this package and use the built-in solution.

predis/predis.notes: predis v2 required for PHP 8.x compatibility. Alternatively use the phpredis extension. Run: composer require predis/predis:^2.0

intervention/image.notes: Intervention Image v2.7+ supports Laravel 9. Note: v3.x requires PHP 8.1; stay on v2.7 for PHP 8.0 environments.

doctrine/dbal.notes: Laravel 9 requires doctrine/dbal ^3.1 for schema modification methods (change(), renameColumn() etc). Run: composer require doctrine/dbal:^3.1
